src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Modernize Javadoc comments to use code formatting and correct capitalization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: * This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace verbose block comment with a concise single-line comment.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit Spring Boot annotations with the consolidated @SpringBootApplication annotation.
Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for the Environment bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject field; added constructor taking Environment and assigning it to a final field.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new package structure of JHipster configuration classes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced io.github.jhipster.sample.config imports with tech.jhipster.config imports.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom Constants class references with standard JHipsterConstants.
Refactor application startup logging to handle SSL and context paths correctly and remove checked exception from main.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Extracted logging logic to logApplicationStartup method, added SSL protocol detection, and wrapped UnknownHostException in try-catch.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update configuration property binding to use the new ApplicationProperties class.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject on field and added constructor taking Environment.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the newer Profiles.of() API instead of string constants.
Refactor AspectJ pointcuts to target Spring stereotypes and specific packages rather than generic package wildcards.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced single loggingPointcut with springBeanPointcut (stereotypes) and applicationPackagePointcut (packages).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to reduce code duplication and improve clarity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private Logger logger(JoinPoint joinPoint) method and used it in advice methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify log message templates by removing redundant class name logging since the logger is already scoped to the class.
Migrate from custom JHipsterProperties to Spring Boot's TaskExecutionProperties for thread pool configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced JHipsterProperties injection with TaskExecutionProperties constructor injection and updated getter calls.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to the new tech.jhipster package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed import from io.github.jhipster.sample.async to tech.jhipster.async.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject field and added constructor parameter for TaskExecutionProperties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused wildcard imports and organize import statements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.*;' with specific imports and removed unused javax.inject.Inject.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to improve testability and adhere to modern Spring best practices.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with setter injection for optional dependencies (Registration, GitProperties, BuildProperties) to handle missing beans gracefully.
Update imports to use wildcard for Hazelcast config classes and add new Spring Boot info and JHipster config imports.
Externalize Hazelcast cache configuration values (backup count, time to live) from hardcoded defaults to JHipsterProperties.
Add a custom KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator to ensure cache keys are unique across different application versions/commits.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Bean public KeyGenerator keyGenerator() { return new PrefixedKeyGenerator(this.gitProperties, this.buildProperties); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove static HazelcastInstance field and getter, relying on Spring-managed bean lifecycle instead.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed: private static HazelcastInstance hazelcastInstance; public static HazelcastInstance getHazelcastInstance()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused @AutoConfigureAfter annotation and @SuppressWarnings annotation.
Add check to return existing Hazelcast instance if already initialized, preventing duplicate instance creation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: HazelcastInstance hazelCastInstance = Hazelcast.getHazelcastInstanceByName("jhipsterSampleGateway"); if (hazelCastInstance != null) { return hazelCastInstance; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add ManagementCenterConfig to Hazelcast configuration.
Update log messages to use parameterized logging instead of string concatenation.
The login validation regex was updated to support email addresses and a broader set of special characters.
Removed hardcoded Spring profile constants (dev, prod, cloud, heroku, etc.) likely in favor of configuration properties or externalized config.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT, SPRING_PROFILE_PRODUCTION, SPRING_PROFILE_CLOUD, SPRING_PROFILE_HEROKU, SPRING_PROFILE_SWAGGER, SPRING_PROFILE_NO_LIQUIBASE

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Renamed the constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM for brevity or consistency with other parts of the codebase.
Added a constant for the default application language.
Changed the empty private constructor body from block style to inline style.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment bean to align with modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public DatabaseConfiguration(Environment env) { this.env = env; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate H2 TCP server creation to a JHipster helper class and change return type to Object to avoid dependency on specific H2 Server class.
Implement logic to calculate a valid port for the H2 TCP server based on the application server port.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove manual Hibernate4Module bean definition, likely relying on auto-configuration or Jackson modules.
Update import to use the new JHipster constants package location.
Clean up imports that are no longer used after removing manual bean configurations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove import for RateLimitingRepository which is no longer used in the configuration.
Remove import for javax.inject.Inject as constructor injection is used instead.
Add space before opening brace in method definition for code style consistency.
Simplify JavaDoc for RateLimitingConfiguration to reflect the switch from Cassandra to Bucket4J.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for JHipsterProperties in RateLimitingConfiguration.
Remove the explicit name attribute from the @Bean annotation for localeResolver, relying on the method name instead.
Replace specific imports with wildcard imports for Spring Web MVC configuration annotations.
Replace deprecated Spring Boot Constants with JHipster-specific constants for profile definition.
Inject Environment bean into the configuration to pass it to the LoggingAspect constructor.
Update LoggingAspect instantiation to accept the Environment object.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for Spring beans and values to align with modern best practices.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace manual Logback appender configuration with centralized JHipster LoggingUtils helper methods.
Add support for JSON formatted console logging based on JHipster properties.
Include application build version in logging custom fields using Spring Boot BuildProperties.
Enable configuration refresh for logging settings in cloud environments.
Change custom fields from string concatenation to JSON serialization via ObjectMapper for safety and extensibility.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final TokenProvider tokenProvider; public SecurityConfiguration(TokenProvider tokenProvider, ...) { this.tokenProvider = tokenProvider; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the configuration class.
Integrate Zalando Problem library for standardized HTTP error responses in security contexts.
Explicitly add the CorsFilter to the security filter chain to ensure CORS headers are applied correctly.
Configure Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, and Feature-Policy headers to enhance browser security.
Change frame options from disabled to deny to prevent clickjacking attacks.
Update the list of static resources ignored by Spring Security to match current frontend asset structure.
Refine API endpoint permissions, including renaming reset password endpoints and adding management endpoints.
Remove the legacy AuthenticationManagerBuilder configuration as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
Remove the SecurityEvaluationContextExtension bean which is no longer required.
